name: bible-context-research
description: Historically grounded, denominationally neutral context for biblical books, passages, terms, and themes.

interface.shortDescription: Explore Scripture in its ancient context.
interface.longDescription: Research historical, cultural, political, geographical, literary, linguistic, audience, dating, authorship, and ancient comparative context without imposing doctrinal conclusions.
defaultPrompt: Give me a reading companion for Numbers 1.
Show me the Bible Context Research menu.
Trace the firstborn theme through Scripture.
